calendar.matters:
Petition To Instruct Trustee To Account And Surcharge Trustee
Off Calendar Jul-30-2024 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jun-12-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Scott Grossman appeared by zoom for petitioners.
Kale Heiman appeared by zoom for Rosemary Lopez (trustee).

Mr. Grossman stated that everyone who was entitled to notice were served, that they are entered in the middle of page two running into the middle of page 3 and addressed the issue of legal standing stating that his 17200 petition is what lead to this, that there was a ton of uncollected rents and that they settled for less than what they were asking for. Mrs. Heiman stated that she supports the petition. Mr. Grossman also stated that he intends to dismiss the pending petition that is on calendar for July 30, 2024. The Petition to Approve Settlement Agreement is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition To Instruct Trustee To Account And Surcharge Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-30-2024 Continued To Jul-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Instruct Trustee To Account And Surcharge Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-20-2024 Continued To Apr-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Instruct Trustee To Account And Surcharge Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-24-2024 Continued To Mar-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Kale Heiman appearing via zoom for Rosemary Lopez (trustee).
Scott Grossman appearing via zoom for Krystal, Stacey, Joe, Freddy and George Guerrero(petitioners).

Mr. Grossman stated that there is a settlement offer in place, that the parties are fairly close to resolution, and that he will file a Petition for settlement agreement. Petition to instruct trustee to account and surcharge trustee is continued to March 20, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition To Instruct Trustee To Account And Surcharge Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-04-2023 Continued To Jan-24-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Instruct Trustee To Account And Surcharge Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-14-2023 Continued To Oct-04-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Kale Heiman appearing via zoom for Rosemary Lopez (trustee).
Scott Grossman appearing via zoom for Krystal, Stacey, Joe, Freddy and George Guerrero(petitioners).

Mr. Grossman spoke of the surcharge fees and how it's not been resolved and remains a live issue. Mrs. Heiman stated that the trust has very little asset. The Court raised the issue that both parties should make efforts to resolve the issues. Petition to instruct trustee to account and surcharge trustee is continued to October 04, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

Petition To Instruct Trustee To Account And Surcharge Trustee
Off Calendar May-03-2023 Continued To Jun-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Scott Grossman appearing via zoom for Petitioners.
Alexandra Coleman and Kale Heiman appearing via zoom for and with Rosemary Lopez (Objector).

The Court asked what the schedule is for the code compliant accounting. Mrs. Coleman stated that they plan to have the accounting completed within the next thirty days and that it covers the period of April 9th 2015 through December 31st 2022. The Court informed Mrs. Coleman that it will not review a 7 year accounting, that the first accounting would be a 2 year accounting, and suggested that the parties meet and confer. Discussion was held regarding Mrs. Coleman's attempt to provide the accounting to Mr. Grossman as well as her request for information with no response, the issue of the trust not being under Court supervision, Mr. Grossman indicating that he is not seeking Court supervision, how quickly the trust would be eaten up if the Court is required to adjudicate 3 accountings, etc., The petition to instruct trustee to account and surcharge trustee is continued to June 14, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge; Joseph Quinn; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Cristobal; Not reported.

Petition To Determine Felonious And Intentional Killing Of Settlor And Ascertain Beneficiaries Of Exemption Trust
Off Calendar Jul-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Scott Grossman, via Zoom, for Krystal Crickett, Stacey Guerrero, Joe Guerrero, Freddy Guerrero, and George Guerrero, Petitioners; Deidre Von Rock, via Zoom, for Rosemary Lopez, Trustee.

The court queries Mr. Grossman regarding whether the petitioners should be deemed as beneficiaries of Survivor's Trust, rather than the Exemption Trust. Mr. Grossman offers testimony in support of his client's petition specifically regarding Roberto Rodriguez intentionally and feloniously killing Mary Rodriguez and he predeceased Mary making his clients the beneficiaries of the Exemption Trust. Ms. Von Rock advises that she has no dispute with the petition.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Petition To Determine Felonious And Intentional Killing Of Settlor And Ascertain Beneficiaries Of Exemption Trust
Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Continued To Jul-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
